description: Per-EA graduation config for Alex. Lanes listed in autonomousLanes are graduated to autonomous-send. EMPTY by default — drafts-only is preserved until the operator deliberately graduates a lane.
notes: To graduate a lane, edit autonomousLanes and append the lane name. The next dispatcher cycle picks up the change. The history field records every change for audit.
Even when a lane is graduated, the always-approval overlay (config/always-approval-jeff.json) may still force approval for specific counterparties.

Recommended first graduation candidate (when the operator is ready): 'autonomous' lane only — covers acks, calendar proposals, scheduling, and routine internal-domain replies. Avoid graduating 'approval' or 'principal_only' — those are intentionally never autonomous.
